title: Equinix and GIC to Invest US$525 Million to Build Hyperscale Data Centers in Korea
text: REDWOOD CITY, Calif., Jan. 26, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Equinix, Inc. (Nasdaq: EQIX), the world's digital infrastructure companyTM, today announced the signing of an agreement to form a US$525 million joint venture in the form of a limited liability partnership with GIC, Singapore's sovereign wealth fund, to develop and operate two xScale data centers in Seoul, Korea.

title: 4 Real Estate Companies With Predictable Revenue Growth
text: In light of increasing home prices during November 2021, four real estate companies that have high profitability and are trading at fair GF Value as of January include American Tower Corp. title: Leading Partners Join Forces with Equinix to Test Sustainable Data Center Innovations Including Fuel Cell and Liquid Cooling Technologies
text: REDWOOD CITY, Calif., Jan. 20, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Equinix, Inc. (Nasdaq: EQIX), the world's digital infrastructure company™, today announced the opening of its first Co-Innovation Facility (CIF), located in its DC15 International Business Exchange™ (IBX®) data center at the Equinix Ashburn Campus in the Washington, D.C.

title: Equinix (EQIX) Expands in Paris With New IBX Data Center
text: Catering to growth of the local digital economy and digital transformation strategies in the French market, Equinix (EQIX) fortifies its presence in Paris with a new data-center facility.

title: Equinix Announces Tax Treatment of 2021 Distributions
text: REDWOOD CITY, Calif., Jan. 18, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Equinix, Inc. (Nasdaq: EQIX), the world's digital infrastructure company™, today announced the tax treatment for all 2021 distributions on its common stock.

title: Digital Business Boom and Sustainability-Driven Initiatives Underpin Equinix's Investment in Tenth Paris Data Center
text: REDWOOD CITY, Calif., Jan. 17, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Equinix, Inc. (Nasdaq: EQIX), the world's digital infrastructure company™, today announced a new International Business Exchange™ (IBX®) data center in Paris, France.

title: Equinix connects Antoni van Leeuwenhoek hospital with ADVA's encrypted transport solution
text: AMSTERDAM--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #100G--ADVA (FSE: ADV) today announced that Equinix – the world's digital infrastructure company™ – has deployed ADVA's FSP 3000 open optical transport technology to provide Antoni van Leeuwenhoek, one of the Netherland's leading hospitals, with encrypted dark fiber and fully managed services. title: MEDIA ALERT: Equinix Sets Conference Call for Fourth Quarter and Full Year Results
text: REDWOOD CITY, Calif., Jan. 10, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Equinix, Inc. (Nasdaq: EQIX), the world's digital infrastructure company™, today announced that it will hold its quarterly conference call on Wednesday, February 16 at 5:30 p.m.

title: Equinix Promotes Jon Lin to EVP & GM, Data Center Services
text: REDWOOD CITY, Calif., Jan. 7, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Equinix, Inc. (Nasdaq: EQIX), the world's digital infrastructure company™, today announced the appointment of Jon Lin to the position of EVP & General Manager, Data Center Services, effective immediately.
